or other container to sort into","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7169o","text":"Tinfoil - about 8 inches; enough to block light from stained samples","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"r69c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":347453,"guid":"424B7576341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"RBC Lysis Buffer","mol_weight":0,"sku":"420301","url":"https://www.biolegend.com/en-us/products/rbc-lysis-buffer-10x-1498","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":102,"name":"BioLegend","link":"http://www.biolegend.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"1":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":582975,"guid":"42646F12341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"APC anti-human CD19 Clone SJ25C1","mol_weight":0,"sku":"392503","url":"http://www.biolegend.com","cas_number":"","rrid":"AB_2564128","vendor":{"id":102,"name":"BioLegend","link":"http://www.biolegend.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"2":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":582977,"guid":"42646FB6341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"FITC anti-human CD3 Clone HIT3a","mol_weight":0,"sku":"300305","url":"http://biolegend.com","cas_number":"","rrid":"AB_314041","vendor":{"id":102,"name":"BioLegend","link":"http://www.biolegend.com/","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/placeholder.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Clean biosafety cabinent by UV for 15 minutes, then wipe with Ethanol. Human blood requires BioSafety Level 2. We used this protocol with human blood from healthy donors collected from the Student Health Center. Alternatives such as mice blood will have different safety requirements. Gather pipettes, tubes, racks, and waste container into the cabinent. One person can set up while another is bringing the blood over on ice if two people are available for prep, otherwise leave blood on ice during initial setup. Old blood (such as from a previous draw) was used for PI+ control, however cells may be otherwise lysed for it.

For each control and sample, you will need about 2.4 mL PBS Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP24384 and 4 mL RBC Lysis Buffer BioLegend Catalog #420301 Round up when aliquoting from the stock. Let both stand at room temperature. We have 10X RBC Lysis Buffer. Prepare the buffer by diluting to 1X with DI Water. For our typical prep of 3 reps x 2 subjects + 4 controls, or 10 tubes, you'll need 25-30 mL PBS and 40-50 mL 1X RBC Lysis Buffer.

Prepare 5ml FACS tubes filled with 4 mL, (~4ml) of RBC Lysis Buffer BioLegend Catalog #420301 at room temp. 1 FACS tube for each replicate - generally 3 per sample 4 more FACS tubes for Controls: Cells Only, FITC only, APC only, PI only (Additional single color controls as necessary.)

Vortex the blood if necessary. Human blood is handled at BioSafety Level 2. Add blood samples to the corresponding tube: 200 µL of blood for each sample 100 µL of blood for each control For PI control, use old blood if available; otherwise you will need to lyse or damage the cells
Wait 00:03:00 for RBC lysis and then centrifuge 5 rpm, °C, 5 minutes .

Decant into waste bleach solution, blot on paper towel without resuspending. If red blood cells are still visible in the pellet, add an additional 4 mL, (~4ml) of RBC Lysis Buffer BioLegend Catalog #420301 and repeat incubation and centrifugation. Otherwise, the pellet should be white or clear and will be thin.

Prepare staining mix in DARK: (cabinet lights off is sufficient) Master Mix - Per sample: 100 µL of PBS PBS Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP24384 Add 5 µL CD3 FITC FITC anti-human CD3 Clone HIT3a BioLegend Catalog #300305 (RRID: AB_314041) 5 µL CD19 APC APC anti-human CD19 Clone SJ25C1 BioLegend Catalog #392503 (RRID: AB_2564128) and 10 µL PI For single color controls, it may be easiest to add 100 µL PBS followed by the stain directly to the FACS tube, rather than mixing the stain in a separate container first.
Add 100 µL PBS/stain mix to each sample.
Incubate cells for 00:15:00 to 20 minutes in the dark, such as covered with tin foil.
Add ~ 2 mL of PBS to each tube, centrifuge 250 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Decant by dump-tap. Resuspend in 300 µL PBS.
Filter using 40ul filter prior to any FACS sort. – The cap filters need to be centrifuged, just a minute or two and softly will work. 100 x g, °C, 1 minute
Wipe the cabinent with ethanol, then turn UV on for 00:15:00 It may be helpful to turn it on, take the cells for the sort, then come back or have someone else turn it off.
creator: Michaela A McCown
